prompt: A slow-motion close-up of a person laughing on a sun-drenched rooftop, golden hour light wrapping around their face, shallow depth of field, warm cinematic color grade, handheld camera feel, Instagram Reels format 9:16
tool_notes: On Pika add 'smooth motion'. On Kling specify '6 seconds'.

prompt: A barista pouring latte art in extreme slow motion, steam rising dramatically, dark moody café background with bokeh string lights, cinematic 24fps feel, vertical 9:16 format, rich brown and amber tones
tool_notes: Use 'slow motion' keyword explicitly on Pika for best results.

prompt: A skateboarder performing a trick at sunset in an empty urban plaza, low angle tracking shot, lens flare cutting through the frame, gritty cinematic grade, fast cut energy, 9:16 vertical
tool_notes: Sora handles motion blur naturally here. Add 'sharp details' on Runway.

prompt: A woman walking through a crowded neon night market, slow push-in shot, bokeh lights blurring behind her, cinematic anamorphic lens flares, moody and atmospheric, 9:16 vertical format

prompt: An extreme close-up of rain droplets hitting a puddle in slow motion, city reflections shimmering in the water, cold blue cinematic tone, minimalist composition, satisfying loop-friendly ending, 9:16

prompt: A group of friends at a backyard summer party in the late 80s, handheld VHS camcorder aesthetic, washed-out colors, scan lines and film grain overlay, timestamp in corner, warm nostalgic feel, 9:16 vertical

prompt: A city street at night shot on a VHS camcorder, neon signs bleeding color, slight tracking distortion, lo-fi grainy texture, 90s aesthetic, fast walking POV shot, vertical 9:16
